etymology.description: 宀 (house) + 女 (a kneeling woman) = feeling at ease, to be safe -> peace; safety; quiet; calm
etymology.interpretation: The image of a woman under a roof suggests domestic tranquility and being at ease, illustrating the concepts of peace and safety found at home. This extends to the idea of quiet or calm, as a secure and restful home environment evokes these states.

examples.chinese: 夜晚很安静(夜晚很安靜)。
确保大家的安全(確保大家的安全)。
和平时期(和平時期)，人民过得很安宁(人民過得很安寧)。
examples.pinyin: Hépíng shíqī, rénmín guò de hěn ānníng.
examples.english: During times of peace, people live very peacefully.
